mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PERMISSION_LINE pl JOIN PERMISSION p ON p.permission_id = pl.permission_id WHERE pl.line_id = #{lineId} AND p.permission_title = #{permissionTitle} AND pl.is_enable = TRUE ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS isEnable, f.family_id AS familyId, f.pool_total_data AS sharedPoolTotalData FROM FAMILY_LINE fl JOIN FAMILY f ON f.family_id = fl.family_id WHERE fl.family_id = #{familyId} AND fl.line_id = #{lineId}

SELECT u.user_id AS userId, l.line_id AS lineId, p.plan_id AS planId, u.user_name AS userName, l.phone AS phone, p.plan_name AS planName, l.remaining_data AS remainingData, p.basic_data_amount AS basicDataAmount, fl.role AS role, f.pool_total_data AS sharedPoolTotalAmount, f.pool_remaining_data AS sharedPoolRemainingAmount FROM FAMILY_LINE fl JOIN LINE l ON l.line_id = fl.line_id JOIN USERS u ON u.user_id = l.user_id JOIN PLAN p ON p.plan_id = l.plan_id JOIN FAMILY f ON f.family_id = fl.family_id WHERE fl.family_id = #{familyId} ORDER BY CASE fl.role WHEN 'OWNER' THEN 0 WHEN 'MEMBER' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, l.line_id ASC

SELECT l.line_id AS lineId, u.user_id AS userId, u.user_name AS userName, l.phone AS phone FROM FAMILY_LINE fl JOIN LINE l ON fl.line_id = l.line_id JOIN USERS u ON l.user_id = u.user_id JOIN FAMILY f ON f.family_id = fl.family_id WHERE fl.family_id = #{familyId} AND l.deleted_at IS NULL AND f.deleted_at IS NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM FAMILY_LINE fl2 WHERE fl2.family_id = #{familyId} AND fl2.line_id = #{lineId} ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN l.line_id = #{lineId} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, l.line_id ASC
SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PERMISSION_LINE pl JOIN PERMISSION p ON p.permission_id = pl.permission_id WHERE pl.line_id = #{lineId} AND p.permission_id = 2 AND pl.is_enable = TRUE )
